name: authorized-media-converter
description: Authorized media converter split across a GitHub Pages frontend and Cloud Run services.

scripts.dev:docs: node -e "console.log('Run these in separate terminals: npm run dev:frontend, npm run dev:api, npm run dev:worker')"
scripts.deploy:api:docs: node -e "console.log('See docs/deployment.md and scripts/deploy-api-cloud-run.ps1 for the minimal Cloud Run API deployment path.')"
